notes: The in-app Generation setup guide detects NVIDIA VRAM, recommends curated model families that suit the machine, and reuses existing files. Users may override recommendations after reviewing difficulty warnings.

features.label: Image generation + style + depth + SeedVR2
features.variant: Krea 2 FP8 or native INT8 ConvRot with dynamic VRAM offloading + SeedVR2 FP8

features.label: Klein 4B Edit + Outpaint
features.variant: Klein 4B FP8 with system-RAM offload; configured GGUF files use the GGUF loader

features.label: Klein 9B Edit + Outpaint
features.variant: Klein 9B FP8; configured GGUF files use the GGUF loader

features.label: Qwen Edit + Outpaint + multi-angle
features.variant: Qwen Image Edit 2511 BF16; configured GGUF files use the GGUF loader

features.label: Krea 2 Inpaint + Outpaint + Regions
features.variant: Krea 2 FP8 or native INT8 ConvRot; low-VRAM requests ask before safer settings are applied

features.label: Krea 2 Edit + Identity Outpaint
features.variant: Krea 2 FP8 or INT8 ConvRot + Identity Edit LoRA with offloading

features.label: LTX 2.3 Video + Face ID
features.variant: LTX 2.3 22B FP8; 8 GB is an experimental tier with aggressive offload

features.label: LTX Edit Anything
features.variant: LTX 2.3 22B FP8 adapter; 8 GB is an experimental tier with aggressive offload

features.label: 10Eros DMD
features.variant: 10Eros FP8 mixed; 8 GB is an experimental tier with aggressive offload

features.label: Wan 2.2 Video
features.variant: Wan 2.2 14B FP8; 8 GB is an experimental offload tier and configured GGUF pairs use the GGUF loader

features.label: SCAIL 2 Motion Transfer
features.variant: SCAIL 2 14B FP8; 8 GB is an experimental offload tier and configured GGUF files use the GGUF loader
